metadata.name: NetBird Network Resource
metadata.description: Creates a NetBird network resource and attaches it to one or more groups.

items.name: resource_name
items.title: Name
items.description: Name of the NetBird network resource.

items.name: network_name
items.title: Network Name
items.description: Existing NetBird network name for the parent network resource lookup.

items.name: resource_address
items.title: Address
items.description: Host, subnet, or domain address for the resource.

items.name: group_names
items.title: Group Names
items.description: Comma-separated existing NetBird group names to attach to this resource.

items.name: resource_description
items.title: Description
items.description: Optional description for the NetBird network resource.

items.name: resource_enabled
items.title: Enabled
items.description: Enable the network resource after creation.
